item.title: Are Ind Bank Housing Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Ind Bank Housing Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing a net loss of ₹0.02 crores and zero net sales, indicating operational inactivity and significant financial distress, with negative shareholder equity of ₹120.87 crores. Despite a volatile stock performance, the company's fundamentals suggest no clear path to recovery or profitability. Time: Apr 14 2026 07:11 PM IST
